reasoning:

The upward trend (slope +0.0236) with negative momentum (-0.0138) suggests media tone is slowly improving from crisis peaks, but deceleration indicates fragility—likely reflecting temporary humanitarian interventions or seasonal harvest improvements that mask underlying structural food insecurity vulnerabilities across multiple African regions.
